description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard accompanied by a matching mouse, both featuring a sleek, modern design. The keyboard has a black frame with white, rectangular keys arranged in a standard layout, including a numeric keypad on the right. The keys are slightly raised and evenly spaced, with a low-profile chassis that appears to be made of plastic. The mouse is compact, ergonomically shaped, and matches the keyboard's color scheme. There are no visible cables or connectors, suggesting a wireless setup. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for office or home use.
description: A full-size black and white keyboard with a matching wireless mouse, featuring a standard key layout and a modern, low-profile design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard and the mouse to the right.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the length of the keyboard and the mouse positioned below.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge of the keyboard and the mouse to the left.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view from the opposite side, with the mouse above the keyboard.
